title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Surat team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz General Global Group:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group!
